# Carrera Run Knowledge Base

This directory contains coaching knowledge, methodology references, and athlete context resources used by the Running Coach Agent.

## Structure

### [Coaching Methodology](./coaching-methodology/)
Evidence-based training frameworks and guidance:
- **[Training Types & Workout Prescriptions](./coaching-methodology/training-types.md)** — Definition and execution of quality, easy, and long runs
- **[Pace Zones & Training Intensity](./coaching-methodology/pace-zones.md)** — Heart rate and pace zones for different training intensities
- **[Marathon Training Framework](./coaching-methodology/marathon-framework.md)** — Default marathon training philosophy and progression rules

### [Athlete Context](./athlete-context/)
Sample profiles and patterns for personalizing coaching:
- **[Sample Athlete Profiles](./athlete-context/sample-profiles.md)** — Example athlete scenarios with fitness levels and goals

---

## How the Agent Uses This Knowledge

The Running Coach Agent references these documents when:
- Creating new training plans
- Recommending workout types and paces
- Adjusting plans based on athlete progress
- Explaining training methodology to users

Each file includes specific guidance the agent should apply in decision-making.
